title: Job Opening Teacher at British Council India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at British Council India
jsonLd.description:
Join the British Council India family as a Teacher in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About British Council India:
British Council India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with British Council India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
